top3.sql:
SELECT m.last_name, m.position
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
JOIN event ev ON e.link_to_budget = (SELECT budget_id FROM budget WHERE link_to_event = ev.event_id)
WHERE e.expense_date = '2019-09-10'
AND e.expense_description LIKE '%pizza%';

SELECT m.last_name, m.position
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
JOIN event ev ON e.link_to_budget = (SELECT budget_id FROM budget WHERE link_to_event = ev.event_id)
WHERE e.expense_date = '2019-09-10'
AND e.expense_description LIKE '%pizza%';

SELECT m.last_name, m.position
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
WHERE e.expense_date = '2019-09-10'
AND e.expense_description LIKE '%pizza%';

SELECT m.last_name, m.position
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE e.expense_date = '2019-09-10'
AND e.expense_description LIKE '%pizza%';

SELECT m.last_name, m.position
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
JOIN event ev ON e.link_to_budget = (SELECT budget_id FROM budget WHERE link_to_event = ev.event_id)
WHERE e.expense_date = '2019-09-10'
AND e.expense_description LIKE '%pizza%';

SELECT m.last_name, m.position
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
WHERE e.expense_date = '2019-09-10'
AND e.expense_description LIKE '%pizza%';

SELECT m.last_name, m.position
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
WHERE e.expense_date = '2019-09-10'
AND LOWER(e.expense_description) LIKE '%pizza%';

final.sql:
SELECT m.last_name, m.position
FROM member m
JOIN expense e ON m.member_id = e.link_to_member
JOIN event ev ON e.link_to_budget = (SELECT budget_id FROM budget WHERE link_to_event = ev.event_id)
WHERE e.expense_date = '2019-09-10'
AND e.expense_description LIKE '%pizza%';
